intended_use: The SonoVision™ Ultrasound Imaging System is a general purpose ultrasound system intended for use by a qualified physician for the visualization and evaluation of nerves, vascular and other anatomical
intended_use_full: The SonoVision™ Ultrasound Imaging System is a general purpose ultrasound system intended for use by a qualified physician for the visualization and evaluation of nerves, vascular and other anatomical structures. The system provides imaging assistance in spinal procedure applications.
target_condition: Spinal procedures requiring intraoperative visualization of nerves, vascular and anatomical structures
